api.server: Server error. Please try again later.

tzUnsupported.title: Region not yet supported
tzUnsupported.body: We don't have a timezone mapping for {{country}}. Selection is blocked because we can't guarantee notifications will fire at the correct time.

banner.sync-failed: Could not refresh data. Showing what we last saved.
banner.partial-sync: Couldn't fully refresh year-end data. Some Dec→Jan notifications may be missing.
banner.partial-schedule: Some notifications could not be scheduled or removed.
banner.hydration-timeout: Some saved data could not be read.
banner.device-registration-incompatible: This app version isn't compatible with the server — please update from the store.
banner.push-token-unavailable: Couldn't get a push notification ID right now. Check your connection and try again shortly.
banner.toggle-failed: Your preference was saved, but rescheduling failed.
banner.parse-skipped: Some prayer times could not be read, so a few notifications may be missing.
banner.native-arm-failed: Couldn't set the full-adhan alarm. Other notifications are unaffected.

onboardingFinalize.title: Setup didn't finish
onboardingFinalize.body: We could not download prayer times or register your device. Check your connection and try again.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Adhan notifications, anywhere in the world.
onboarding.permissionsBody: We need permission to deliver prayer time alerts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restartRequired: Restart the app to finish applying the text-direction change.
settings.deleteAccountBody: Your device record on the server will be removed, the push fallback will stop, and all local data will be cleared. You will start over.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Server-side deletion failed — local data was cleared anyway.
settings.deviceRegistrationFailedHint: Your device hasn't been registered with the push fallback yet. Try again.

qibla.permissionBody: We need your location to show the direction of the Kaaba.
qibla.locationServicesOff: Location services are off. Please enable them in system settings.
qibla.sensorMissing: This device has no compass sensor.
qibla.headingFallbackNote: True north unavailable; magnetic north can deviate 5–25° depending on your region. Enable precise location and calibrate the compass.
qibla.calibrationBody: Wave the phone in a figure-8 motion.
qibla.calibrationUnreliable: Compass is unreliable — are there metal or electronic devices nearby?

permissions.exactAlarmBody: On Android the adhan needs the 'Alarms & reminders' permission so it can play at the exact prayer time, even when the app is closed. Open settings and grant it.
permissions.batteryOptBody: Some devices (Xiaomi, Huawei, Samsung) restrict background alarms to save battery, which can delay or drop the adhan. A battery-optimization exemption reduces this but does not fully guarantee it.
